metadata.name: Handle a Lost and Found Inquiry

description: A guest who checked out yesterday calls to report they may have left their tablet in their room.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's past reservation details, including their room number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the guest and the room they stayed in.

nodes.task_description: Check the hotel's lost and found log for a tablet found in that room.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an entry in the log for a tablet matching the guest's description.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest the item was found and arrange for it to be shipped to them.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the item is safe and arranges for its return, collecting shipping details and payment.
